name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-28
title: format-feature-context.py crashes on missing required keys (KeyError)
description: format-feature-context.py lines 21-23 use bracket access (f['name'], f['path'], f['summary']) which raises KeyError if any key is missing. find-feature.py uses .get(..., '') so currently fields are present but empty. Future schema changes or malformed input would crash. Use .get() with defaults or validate before accessing.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3 PR. BUG-21 hardcoded names removed; BUG-28 defensive .get() for optional keys; BUG-7/9/12/14/17 covered by new test-invariant-coverage.py.
